case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. PEDRO MATEO CANIL

NOT REPORTED.(506)

DEFENDANT PEDRO MATEO CANIL IS NOT PRESENT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT ARE SWORN IN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
